examples: What led one ichthyosaur to bite another on the snout is unknown.
The fearsome ichthyosaur was one of the very earliest large sea predators.
Fossil forensics has now identified the most likely culprit: another ichthyosaur.
The biggest marine reptile on record is a 21m-long ichthyosaur, Shonisaurus sikanniensis, from Triassic Period rocks in British Columbia, Canada.
